_description: Unitree G1 → Gait 2392 for walking / turns / transitions (both legs + forward/back pelvis).
_vs_sidestep: No leg_asymmetry. body_frame_lateral puts progression on pelvis_tx (sagittal) and side drift on pelvis_tz — avoids world X/Y vs OpenSim forward mismatch from world_plane.
_source_motion_note: A filename like *walk_back* usually means the mocap is backward walking — pelvis_tx should decrease along progression; that is faithful to the clip, not an exporter bug. Use sagittal_scale:-1 only if you want to flip progression (e.g. forward mocap looks reversed in OpenSim).
_pelvis_note: Default sagittal_scale:1 preserves sign of body-frame displacement vs OpenSim pelvis_tx. If root XY is flat, use pelvis_horizontal.mode world_plane in a custom JSON.
_hip_note: hip_flexion_* is G1 hip pitch only; OpenSim hips are 3-DOF (adduction/rotation get roll/yaw). If swing clearance looks flat, inspect hip_flexion columns in the .mot and tune signs/offsets per coordinate.
_motor_order: 0-5 left leg: hip_pitch, hip_roll, hip_yaw, knee, ankle_pitch, ankle_roll
